title: USS Guadalcanal
summary:
Two ships of the United States Navy have been named USS Guadalcanal, after the epic Battle of Guadalcanal in the Solomon Islands during World War II.

The first USS Guadalcanal (CVE-60) was an escort carrier in service from 1943 to 1946.
The second USS Guadalcanal (LPH-7) was an Iwo Jima-class amphibious assault ship in service from 1963 to 1994.
text:
Two ships of the United States Navy have been named USS Guadalcanal, after the epic Battle of Guadalcanal in the Solomon Islands during World War II.

The first USS Guadalcanal (CVE-60) was an escort carrier in service from 1943 to 1946.
The second USS Guadalcanal (LPH-7) was an Iwo Jima-class amphibious assault ship in service from 1963 to 1994.
